properties.name: Snowshoe Mountain Resort
properties.notes: WV's largest ski/snowboard resort; 60 trails, 1,500ft vertical; also mountain biking, golf, events in summer. Pocahontas Co.
properties.visitor_trend: 450,000-480,000 skier visits/yr; top 5% of NA ski resorts
properties.visitor_data_notes: Combined winter skier visits + summer mountain bike/event attendance; Mid-Atlantic/SE's largest resort

properties.name: Timberline Mountain
properties.notes: Ski/snowboard resort in Tucker County; 37 trails, 1,000ft vertical; adjacent to Canaan Valley NWR.
properties.visitor_data_notes: No public visitor count; closed 25/26 season; much smaller than Snowshoe

properties.name: ACE Adventure Resort
properties.address: 1 Ames Heights Rd, Oak Hill, WV 25901
properties.notes: Full-service whitewater resort; New River & Gauley River rafting, zip lines, camping, mountain biking. Near NRG NP.
properties.visitor_data_notes: No public visitor count; private company; largest outdoor adventure resort on New/Gauley rivers

properties.name: Adventures on the Gorge
properties.notes: New River & Gauley whitewater rafting, zip lines, lodging, camping. NRG NP area.
properties.visitor_data_notes: No public visitor count; one of the larger NRG outfitters

properties.name: River Expeditions
properties.notes: New River & Gauley whitewater rafting outfitter. One of the oldest in WV.
properties.visitor_data_notes: No public visitor count; operating since 1972

properties.name: Appalachian Sport
properties.notes: Kayak/canoe rentals, bike rentals, shuttles on the Greenbrier River. On the GRT.
properties.visitor_data_notes: No public visitor count; small outfitter on Greenbrier River Trail

properties.name: Greenbrier River Outfitters
properties.notes: Canoe/kayak/tube rentals and shuttles on the Greenbrier River. Southern GRT access.
properties.visitor_data_notes: No public visitor count; small outfitter

properties.name: Blackwater Outdoor Adventures
properties.notes: Whitewater kayaking/canoeing on Blackwater River and North Fork Blackwater. Also guided hikes.
properties.visitor_data_notes: No public visitor count; small outfitter

properties.name: The Greenbrier Resort
properties.address: 101 Main St W, White Sulphur Springs, WV 24986
properties.notes: Historic luxury resort; 3 golf courses, spa, casino, multiple restaurants. National Historic Landmark.
properties.visitor_data_notes: No public visitor count; 710-room luxury resort; privately held; no published attendance data

properties.name: Elk River Touring Center
properties.notes: Eco-lodge, XC skiing, mountain biking, fly fishing, guided tours. Near Snowshoe.
properties.visitor_data_notes: No public visitor count; small eco-lodge operation

properties.name: Canaan Valley Resort
properties.notes: State-operated resort in Canaan Valley; skiing, golf, indoor pool, hiking. Adjacent to NWR.
properties.visitor_data_notes: No facility-level visitor count published; state-operated through WV DNR

properties.name: Seneca Shadows / Harman's North Fork Cottages
properties.notes: Upscale fly-fishing resort on the North Fork South Branch Potomac. Cabins, guided fishing.
properties.visitor_data_notes: No public visitor count; small boutique cabin/fishing resort

properties.name: Seneca Shadows Campground
properties.notes: USFS campground at base of Seneca Rocks; tent/RV sites, near climbing and hiking. (USFS-managed but included for reference)
properties.visitor_data_notes: USFS campground; part of ~30,000-40,000 annual Seneca Rocks area visitors; no site-level count

properties.name: Watoga State Park Campground
properties.notes: Large state park campground; 88 sites, cabins, near Greenbrier River and ALT.
properties.visitor_data_notes: No separate campground count; part of Watoga State Park overall visitation

properties.name: KOA Campground Elkins
properties.notes: Private KOA campground near Elkins; tent, RV, cabin sites. Regional hub for ALT hikers.
properties.visitor_data_notes: No public visitor count; private KOA franchise

properties.name: Horseshoe Recreation Area / Campground
properties.notes: Private campground near Huttonsville/US 250; convenient to central ALT corridor.
properties.visitor_data_notes: No public visitor count; private campground

properties.name: ACE Adventure Resort Camping
properties.address: 1 Ames Heights Rd, Oak Hill, WV 25901
properties.notes: Large private campground at ACE; tent, RV, glamping. Part of the ACE Adventure complex near NRG.
properties.visitor_data_notes: No separate camping count; included in ACE overall operation

properties.name: Camp Horseshoe
properties.notes: Private residential summer camp in Randolph County. Outdoor and adventure programming.
properties.visitor_data_notes: No public visitor count; private residential summer camp

properties.name: Camp Washington-Carver
properties.notes: Historic African-American 4-H camp; now hosts Appalachian String Band Festival and youth programs. Fayette Co.
properties.visitor_source: WV Division of Culture and History
properties.visitor_data_notes: No public visitor count; festival attendance varies; contact WV 4-H for camp stats

properties.name: Camp Pioneer (WV BSA)
properties.notes: Boy Scouts of America camp in Webster County; hiking, shooting sports, merit badge programs.
properties.visitor_data_notes: No public visitor count; private BSA camp

properties.name: Grottoes of the Virginias / Seneca Caverns Area Camps
properties.notes: Several church and youth camps cluster in the Seneca Rocks/Smoke Hole area of Pendleton County.
properties.visitor_data_notes: No public visitor count; informal cluster of private camps

properties.name: The Greenbrier — Old White TPC
properties.address: 101 Main St W, White Sulphur Springs, WV 24986
properties.notes: PGA Tour venue (A Military Tribute at The Greenbrier); one of 3 courses at The Greenbrier resort.
properties.visitor_data_notes: No public round/visitor count; PGA Tour event attendance tracked separately; course is resort-access only

properties.name: Snowshoe Mountain Golf
properties.notes: 9-hole mountain golf course at Snowshoe Resort; open summer/fall.
properties.visitor_data_notes: No separate count; included in Snowshoe Resort overall ~480K annual visitors

properties.name: Elkins Country Club
properties.notes: 9-hole private/semi-private golf course in Randolph County.
properties.visitor_data_notes: No public visitor count; small private/semi-private club

properties.name: Canaan Valley Resort Golf Course
properties.notes: 18-hole mountain golf course at Canaan Valley Resort State Park.
properties.visitor_data_notes: No separate visitor count; part of Canaan Valley Resort State Park
